Wrenhaven Seagrass Survey 2025

Annual monitoring of the seagrass meadow off Wrenhaven point, conducted by the estuary ecology unit each September.

Findings

The seagrass meadow off Wrenhaven expanded by 12 hectares in 2025, reaching a mapped extent of 87 hectares.

  • Shoot density rose 9 percent year over year.
  • No new propeller-scar damage was recorded inside the buoyed zone.
